name: Uclid
description: A math game aimed at helping students perform simple arithmetic problems faster without the need of a calculator.

name: Smokie
description: A fashion site built for buying and selling of products dynamically populated with an admin dashboard. I also built the admin dashboard.

name: Ayomide
description: This very site you're on right now is my portfolio website built completely by me. It contains my career journey so far as well as my prospects.

name: EchoRank
description: A clone of the popular ChatGPT application built with NextJS and Tailwind CSS. It features a responsive design and a user-friendly interface.

name: Microwd
description: A React Native UI library built with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, designed to provide a consistent and customizable set of components for mobile app development.

name: Signan
description: A personal blog built with NextJS and Tailwind CSS, where I share my thoughts on software development, technology trends, and career advice.

name: Sync
description: A simple weather application built with ReactJS and OpenWeatherMap API, allowing users to check the current weather and forecast for any location.
